---
title: "Guided Tour: R for Photobiology"
subtitle: "Computations and data sets"
date: today
date-modified: today
author: Pedro J. Aphalo
author-meta: Pedro J. Aphalo
listing:
  - id: intro-pages
    categories: true
    contents:
      - "pages/r4p-introduction.qmd"
      - "pages/r4p-book.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, subtitle, date-modified, abstract]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Published"
      date-modified: "Edited"
      abstract: "Abstract"
  - id: r4p-data-pages
    contents:
      - "galleries/online-weather-data.qmd"
      - "galleries/fmi-kumpula.qmd"
      - "galleries/QuickTUV.qmd"
    sort: false
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, subtitle, date-modified, abstract]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Published"
      date-modified: "Edited"
      abstract: "Abstract"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
categories: [r4photobiology, photobiology, Using R]
abstract: |
  This page contains a list of links to pages related to the R for Photobiology packages. **Please see, the web sites documenting each package in the suite, including online-only articles.**
---

## Introduction and book

::: {#intro-pages}
:::

## Importing online data

::: {#r4p-data-pages}
:::
